2026-0573
2026-06-11ESDCDepartment of Employment and Social Development ActReappointment of a Commissioner of the Canada Employment Insurance Commission representing employersReappointment of Nancy Ruth Healey of St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, as a Commissioner of the Canada Employment Insurance Commission representing employers, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of eighteen months, effective July 26, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Employment and Social Development Act
subject: Reappointment of a Commissioner of the Canada Employment Insurance Commission representing employers
precis: Reappointment of Nancy Ruth Healey of St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, as a Commissioner of the Canada Employment Insurance Commission representing employers, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of eighteen months, effective July 26, 2026.
